title: Bedrocked
description: Experience the best of both worlds by turning Minecraft Java into an almost full Bedrock Edition experience. Enjoy the incredible features of both editions in one seamless and awe-inspiring gaming experience.
body:
# **BEDROCKED**

Experience the best of both worlds by turning Minecraft Java into an almost full Bedrock Edition experience. Enjoy the incredible features of both editions in one seamless and awe-inspiring gaming experience. Get ready to take your Minecraft skills to the next level with this amazing transformation. 
_**Made By: Potatoes9411**_

Feel free to message me on Discord @Potatoes9411, or Post your issue/suggestion in the bug tracker if you have any suggestions or issues.

**Issue Tracker: [Issues/Suggestions Here](https://github.com/Potatoes9411/Bedrocked/issues)**
### Contact me on either as well:

**[My YouTube](https://youtube.com/@Spudventurer)**

**[My Twitch](https://twitch.tv/Potatoes9411)**
